properties.name: grails.controllers.defaultScope
properties.description: The default scope for controllers (singleton, prototype, session).

properties.name: grails.controllers.upload.location
properties.description: The directory for temporary file uploads.

properties.name: grails.controllers.upload.maxFileSize
properties.description: Maximum file size for uploads (in bytes).

properties.name: grails.controllers.upload.maxRequestSize
properties.description: Maximum request size for multipart uploads (in bytes).

properties.name: grails.controllers.upload.fileSizeThreshold
properties.description: File size threshold (in bytes) above which uploads are written to disk.

properties.name: grails.web.url.converter
properties.description: The URL token converter strategy, use hyphenated for hyphen-separated URLs.

properties.name: grails.web.linkGenerator.useCache
properties.description: Whether to cache links generated by the link generator.

properties.name: grails.web.servlet.path
properties.description: The path the Grails dispatcher servlet is mapped to.

properties.name: grails.filter.encoding
properties.description: The character encoding for the Grails character encoding filter.

properties.name: grails.filter.forceEncoding
properties.description: Whether to force the encoding filter to set the encoding on the response.

properties.name: grails.exceptionresolver.logRequestParameters
properties.description: Whether to log request parameters in exception stack traces.

properties.name: grails.exceptionresolver.params.exclude
properties.description: List of parameter names to mask (replace with [*****]) in exception stack traces, typically used for password and creditCard.

properties.name: grails.logging.stackTraceFiltererClass
properties.description: Fully qualified class name of a custom StackTraceFilterer implementation.

properties.name: grails.cors.enabled
properties.description: Whether CORS support is enabled.

properties.name: grails.cors.filter
properties.description: Whether CORS is handled via a servlet filter (true) or an interceptor (false).

properties.name: grails.cors.allowedOrigins
properties.description: List of allowed origins (e.g., http://localhost:5000), only applies when grails.cors.enabled is true.

properties.name: grails.cors.allowedMethods
properties.description: List of allowed HTTP methods.

properties.name: grails.cors.allowedHeaders
properties.description: List of allowed request headers.

properties.name: grails.cors.exposedHeaders
properties.description: List of response headers to expose to the client.

properties.name: grails.cors.maxAge
properties.description: How long (in seconds) the preflight response can be cached.

properties.name: grails.cors.allowCredentials
properties.description: Whether credentials (cookies, authorization headers) are supported.

properties.name: grails.cors.mappings
properties.description: Map of URL patterns to per-path CORS configuration where defining any mapping disables the global /** mapping.

properties.name: grails.mime.types
properties.description: Map of MIME type names to content type strings used for content negotiation.

properties.name: grails.mime.file.extensions
properties.description: Whether to use the file extension to determine the MIME type in content negotiation.

properties.name: grails.mime.use.accept.header
properties.description: Whether to use the Accept header for content negotiation.

properties.name: grails.mime.disable.accept.header.userAgents
properties.description: List of user agent substrings (matched case-insensitively) for which Accept header processing is disabled.

properties.name: grails.mime.disable.accept.header.userAgentsXhr
properties.description: When true, XHR requests also respect the grails.mime.disable.accept.header.userAgents setting, while by default XHR requests ignore user agent filtering.

properties.name: grails.converters.encoding
properties.description: The character encoding for converter output (JSON or XML).

properties.name: grails.resources.enabled
properties.description: Whether serving static files from src/main/resources/public is enabled.

properties.name: grails.resources.pattern
properties.description: The URL path pattern for serving static resources.

properties.name: grails.resources.cachePeriod
properties.description: The cache period (in seconds) for static resource HTTP responses.

properties.name: grails.urlmapping.cache.maxsize
properties.description: The maximum size of the URL mapping cache.

properties.name: grails.scaffolding.templates.domainSuffix
properties.description: The suffix appended to domain class names when generating scaffolding templates.
